metadata.notes: Portugal IRS (mainland Art. 68) 2026 brackets, with Azores (flat 30% rate reduction) and Madeira (30% up to the 6th bracket, then 15%/9%/3% on the 7th/8th/9th). Employment specific deduction 8.54 x IAS 2026 = 4,587.09 EUR, or actual Social Security if higher. Employee Social Security 11% (no ceiling). Dependant credit 600 EUR. Single-taxpayer estimate; joint taxation uses the spousal quotient (split by 2).
